{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Operations",
  "description": "Medbury is a Corporate Health Advisory &amp; Management company which provides assistance to organisations that enables them achieve their Workplace Health and Wellness goals. We provide a holistic &ldquo;end to end&rdquo;service that covers all health needs within the workplace. We are a one stop shop for all you company healthcare needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Operations
Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an experienced and strategic Head of Operations to lead and drive operational excellence across our network of clinics.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing clinic operations, driving efficiency, profitability, and scalability, while ensuring high standards in service delivery and patient care across multiple locations.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage multisite clinic operations and expansion
	Drive operational efficiency, cost optimization, and revenue growth
	Oversee provider network management and partnerships
	Ensure compliance, quality standards, and service excellence
	Manage budgets, forecasting, and overall P&amp;L performance
	Lead and develop high-performing teams across operations


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in a relevant field (Master&rsquo;s degree required &ndash; MBA, MPH, or equivalent)
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in healthcare/wellness operations, with leadership experience
	Strong background in managing multisite healthcare or clinic operations
	Proven experience in business growth, operations management, and team leadership
	Strong analytical, leadership, and communication skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;talentsourcingmms@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Head of Operations&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Head of Operations Job at Medbury Medical Services




        
    

        
        Medbury is a Corporate Health Advisory & Management company which provides assistance to organisations that enables them achieve their Workplace Health and Wellness goals. We provide a holistic “end to end”service that covers all health needs within the workplace. We are a one stop shop for all you company healthcare needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Operations
Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an experienced and strategic Head of Operations to lead and drive operational excellence across our network of clinics.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for overseeing clinic operations, driving efficiency, profitability, and scalability, while ensuring high standards in service delivery and patient care across multiple locations.


Key Responsibilities


	Lead and manage multisite clinic operations and expansion
	Drive operational efficiency, cost optimization, and revenue growth
	Oversee provider network management and partnerships
	Ensure compliance, quality standards, and service excellence
	Manage budgets, forecasting, and overall P&L performance
	Lead and develop high-performing teams across operations


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (Master’s degree required – MBA, MPH, or equivalent)
	Minimum of 7 years of experience in healthcare/wellness operations, with leadership experience
	Strong background in managing multisite healthcare or clinic operations
	Proven experience in business growth, operations management, and team leadership
	Strong analytical, leadership, and communication skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using “Head of Operations” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Logistics Officer",
  "description": "Mobile Screens and Sound Limited, established in 2006, Mobile Screens and Sound was born to fulfill Nigeria&rsquo;s booming entertainment industry&rsquo;s need for high quality LED screens. We quickly developed into a full service Audiovisual provider and technical support company with over 100 highly trained employees. At Mobile Screens and Sound, our strong team of dedicated, knowledgeable and creative individuals strive for excellence, professionalism and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Logistics Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Division / Department: Technical Department
Directly reports to: Head, Technical Operations

Job Summary


	Assist the Logistics Manager in logistics operations by developing strategies for addressing logistical barriers, monitoring the use of materials and resources, and ensuring proper execution of events.


General Duties &amp;&nbsp;Responsibilities


	Establish reports based on logistics movements and distribute them according to requirements
	Identify, mobilize resources, implement and report on special logistics operations
	Ensure that accurate and complete accounting, reporting and internal control systems are functioning and that all relevant records are maintained
	Meet cost, productivity, accuracy and timeliness targets


Core Duties and Responsibilities:


	Plans the execution of events, coordinates drivers, vehicles, loads and journeys for the company
	Identifies and addresses barriers that decrease operational efficiency in the logistics department
	Supervises the maintenance of vehicles and handles other logistical issues such as driver management, vehicle insurance and registration is up to date.
	Making site visits and measuring other aspects such as quality assurance.
	Strategically plan the successful execution of projects with minimal cost and personnel
	Ensure adequate logistics preparedness through contingency planning and continuous logistics preparedness reviews.
	Ensure the company is in compliance with laws and regulations regarding transportation, including hazardous materials.


Key Performance Indicators


	Ensure all maintenance of company vehicles is properly carried out.
	Successful completion of projects within a deadline and budget
	Timeliness in planning, loading, and proper execution of the event
	Proper coordination of logistics operations
	Proper delegation of duties to subordinates, ensuring they are well-trained with up-to-date knowledge of all the driving codes, health safety measures, and road and traffic laws.
	Ensuring that all company vehicle documents are up to date


Qualifications &amp; Education


	First Degree in Business Administration or a related Discipline
	Relevant professional certifications
	Should be well-versed in MS Office
	2 years post-graduation experience


Knowledge &amp; Skills required:


	Excellent communication and people management skills, as well as strong time management and budgeting skills.
	Strong problem-solving skills, decision-making skills, and an innovative approach to addressing issues related to logistics
	Should have good negotiating skills and the ability to establish and maintain effective working relations.
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure
	Must be a team player
	High degree of accuracy and competency required.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 / Month.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-16",

Assistant Logistics Officer Job at Mobile Screens and Sound Limited




        
    

        
        Mobile Screens and Sound Limited, established in 2006, Mobile Screens and Sound was born to fulfill Nigeria’s booming entertainment industry’s need for high quality LED screens. We quickly developed into a full service Audiovisual provider and technical support company with over 100 highly trained employees. At Mobile Screens and Sound, our strong team of dedicated, knowledgeable and creative individuals strive for excellence, professionalism and customer satisfaction.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Logistics Officer
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Location: Ilupeju, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Division / Department: Technical Department
Directly reports to: Head, Technical Operations

Job Summary


	Assist the Logistics Manager in logistics operations by developing strategies for addressing logistical barriers, monitoring the use of materials and resources, and ensuring proper execution of events.


General Duties & Responsibilities


	Establish reports based on logistics movements and distribute them according to requirements
	Identify, mobilize resources, implement and report on special logistics operations
	Ensure that accurate and complete accounting, reporting and internal control systems are functioning and that all relevant records are maintained
	Meet cost, productivity, accuracy and timeliness targets


Core Duties and Responsibilities:


	Plans the execution of events, coordinates drivers, vehicles, loads and journeys for the company
	Identifies and addresses barriers that decrease operational efficiency in the logistics department
	Supervises the maintenance of vehicles and handles other logistical issues such as driver management, vehicle insurance and registration is up to date.
	Making site visits and measuring other aspects such as quality assurance.
	Strategically plan the successful execution of projects with minimal cost and personnel
	Ensure adequate logistics preparedness through contingency planning and continuous logistics preparedness reviews.
	Ensure the company is in compliance with laws and regulations regarding transportation, including hazardous materials.


Key Performance Indicators


	Ensure all maintenance of company vehicles is properly carried out.
	Successful completion of projects within a deadline and budget
	Timeliness in planning, loading, and proper execution of the event
	Proper coordination of logistics operations
	Proper delegation of duties to subordinates, ensuring they are well-trained with up-to-date knowledge of all the driving codes, health safety measures, and road and traffic laws.
	Ensuring that all company vehicle documents are up to date


Qualifications & Education


	First Degree in Business Administration or a related Discipline
	Relevant professional certifications
	Should be well-versed in MS Office
	2 years post-graduation experience


Knowledge & Skills required:


	Excellent communication and people management skills, as well as strong time management and budgeting skills.
	Strong problem-solving skills, decision-making skills, and an innovative approach to addressing issues related to logistics
	Should have good negotiating skills and the ability to establish and maintain effective working relations.
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure
	Must be a team player
	High degree of accuracy and competency required.


Salary
N100,000 - N120,000 / Month.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Facility Officer Job at Doctors Lounge Limited




        
    

        
        Doctors Lounge has now grown to a platform of over 700 Nigerian doctors both within and outside Nigeria. But we are not a doctors-only platform. We offer services that include: Study abroad placements, student loans for international studies and Proof of funds guidance and Visa support services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Facility Officer 
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a facility officer to oversee the day to day operationsof our facilities management services. The successful candidate will be responsible for managing service providers, coordinating maintenance, vendors, and workers and ensuring compliance with safety.


Requirements


	HND/BSC in Estate Management or related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience as a facility officer.
	Experience managing residential areas/ estate and commercial buildings.
	High level of confidentiality and professionalism.
	Ability to work with minimal supervision.


Salary
N150,000 per month.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Production Manager",
  "description": "Buckler Systems is a Nigerian defense solutions provider with strong expertise in manufacturing civilian armored vehicles, design, and prototyping of military vehicles and ordnance equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Epe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Production Oversight: Oversee and manage all aspects of the production process, ensuring efficiency, quality, and compliance with technical standards and safety regulations.
	Team Leadership: Supervise and mentor production staff, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment. Implement training and development programs to enhance team capabilities.
	Process Optimization: Continuously evaluate and improve production processes to enhance efficiency, reduce costs, and maintain the highest quality standards. Implement best practices and innovative solutions.
	Project Management: Lead technical projects from conception through completion, ensuring timely delivery, budget adherence, and alignment with company goals.
	Reporting and Analysis: Prepare and present detailed production reports, analyses, and recommendations to senior management. Utilize data-driven insights to inform decision-making and drive operational excellence.


Qualification


	Educational Background: A Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related field is required. Advanced degrees or additional certifications in production management are a plus.
	Experience: 3-5 years of experience in a production management role, with a proven track record of supervisory or line management responsibilities.
	Technical Expertise: In-depth knowledge of production technical standards, processes, and relevant legislation. Demonstrated proficiency in managing technical projects and ensuring compliance with industry standards.
	Software Proficiency: Strong command of Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Project) is essential. Familiarity with production management software and tools is advantageous.
	Leadership Skills: Proven ability to lead, motivate, and develop a high-performing production team. Excellent problem-solving skills and a strategic approach to managing production challenges.


Why Buckler Land Systems?


	Innovative Environment: Be part of a forward-thinking company that values innovation and continuous improvement.
	Professional Growth: Opportunities for career advancement and professional development in a dynamic and growing organization.
	Competitive Compensation: Attractive salary and benefits package commensurate with experience and expertise.
	Collaborative Culture: Work in a supportive and collaborative environment with a team of dedicated professionals.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to:&nbsp;hr@bucklersystems.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note:&nbsp;Candidates must have prior automobile experience and reside within close proximity to Epe.",

Production Manager Job at Buckler Systems




        
    

        
        Buckler Systems is a Nigerian defense solutions provider with strong expertise in manufacturing civilian armored vehicles, design, and prototyping of military vehicles and ordnance equipment.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Production Manager
Job Location: Epe, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Production Oversight: Oversee and manage all aspects of the production process, ensuring efficiency, quality, and compliance with technical standards and safety regulations.
	Team Leadership: Supervise and mentor production staff, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment. Implement training and development programs to enhance team capabilities.
	Process Optimization: Continuously evaluate and improve production processes to enhance efficiency, reduce costs, and maintain the highest quality standards. Implement best practices and innovative solutions.
	Project Management: Lead technical projects from conception through completion, ensuring timely delivery, budget adherence, and alignment with company goals.
	Reporting and Analysis: Prepare and present detailed production reports, analyses, and recommendations to senior management. Utilize data-driven insights to inform decision-making and drive operational excellence.


Qualification


	Educational Background: A Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related field is required. Advanced degrees or additional certifications in production management are a plus.
	Experience: 3-5 years of experience in a production management role, with a proven track record of supervisory or line management responsibilities.
	Technical Expertise: In-depth knowledge of production technical standards, processes, and relevant legislation. Demonstrated proficiency in managing technical projects and ensuring compliance with industry standards.
	Software Proficiency: Strong command of Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Project) is essential. Familiarity with production management software and tools is advantageous.
	Leadership Skills: Proven ability to lead, motivate, and develop a high-performing production team. Excellent problem-solving skills and a strategic approach to managing production challenges.


Why Buckler Land Systems?


	Innovative Environment: Be part of a forward-thinking company that values innovation and continuous improvement.
	Professional Growth: Opportunities for career advancement and professional development in a dynamic and growing organization.
	Competitive Compensation: Attractive salary and benefits package commensurate with experience and expertise.
	Collaborative Culture: Work in a supportive and collaborative environment with a team of dedicated professionals.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: Candidates must have prior automobile experience and reside within close proximity to Epe.    

    

        Click here to Apply
